safeOperationChecks.label: If Norton reports IDP.Generic, do not force allow the detected file.
If Windows Defender blocks a file, stop and review before continuing private local operation.
Do not restore or reuse files that security software quarantined or deleted.
Do not create, modify, or rely on .bat, .ps1, .cmd, or .exe launch/update files.
Prefer a manual git pull from the private repository when updating.
Prefer manually opening private-local.html for local launch.
Do not switch to GitHub Pages or public URL operation as a workaround.
On company PC, follow company security policy and avoid bypassing endpoint protection.
On home PC, keep private/local operation and avoid allowing unknown executable files.

nextRecommendedStep: If security software blocks a file, stop, do not force allow it, use manual git pull from the private repository, and open private-local.html manually.
